name: RLH Properties, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: RLH Properties, S.A.B. de C.V. engages in the acquisition, development, and management of hotels and resorts. It operates 6 hotels comprising 1,266 rooms; and 2 hotels with approximately 235 rooms, as well as owns approximately 202 villas. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in Mexico City, Mexico.
